title: Bahast
description:
Bahast is a dark fantasy idle ARPG about preparing an adventurer, sending them into dangerous field runs, and turning every haul of loot into the next edge.

Combat resolves automatically, but the decisions are yours: choose a class, shape your build through gear, skills, passives, crafting, and town services, then push deeper into hostile regions built around loot, risk, and long-term progression.

Prepare, Run, Return StrongerEvery expedition starts in Bahast. Manage your inventory, tune your equipment, use crafting currencies, visit town services, and decide when your character is ready for the next push. Once a run begins, your adventurer fights automatically while your preparation is tested.

Build Your Character• Choose from distinct character classes

• Develop your build through gear, skills, and a full passive tree

• Use support systems to sharpen how your character survives, deals damage, and scales

• Chase better item rolls, stronger combinations, and build-defining upgrades

Explore Dangerous RegionsBahast’s world opens through multiple hostile regions, each with its own enemies, rewards, and progression pressure. Push farther, unlock new routes, and return to town with the resources needed to survive the next step.

Loot, Craft, Optimize• Collect weapons, armor, accessories, gold, sigils, and crafting materials

• Sort, stash, sell, gamble, and refine your finds

• Use Reagents and other crafting currencies to improve your equipment

• Turn repeated runs into lasting power

Idle Combat, Real DecisionsBahast is not a click-heavy action game. Your character handles combat automatically, but your planning determines how far they get. The core loop is simple: prepare the build, send them out, study the results, and come back stronger.

Built For Long-Term ProgressionBahast is designed around the satisfaction of idle growth, ARPG loot hunting, and deeper endgame goals. Early progress teaches the systems. Later progress asks you to refine your build, target better rewards, and make harder choices about what your character is becoming.
description_short: A dark fantasy idle ARPG where you prepare a character, send them into automated PvE runs, collect loot, craft stronger gear, and shape your build through skills, passives, and long-term progression.
